# Introduction {.unnumbered}

This is a website dedicated to the creation of morphological transducer for Tsova Tush during the CauLaGe Zemo Alvani Field Research (ZAFieR) Station from August 18 to 26, 2026.

## List of programs {.unnumbered}

```{{shell}}
lexd -V
```

```{python}
!lexd -V
```

```{{shell}}
hfst-twolc -V
```

```{python}
!hfst-twolc -V
```

```{{shell}}
cg3 -V
```

```{python}
!cg3 -V
```

```{{shell}}
git -v
```

```{python}
!git -v
```
